plugins.name: elephant-goldfish
plugins.description: Self-validating /elephant-goldfish:elephant design-doc command + Gemini goldfish judge.

plugins.name: claude-tuneup
plugins.description: Permission audit and settings tuneup — scans transcripts, classifies by scope, deduplicates global vs project settings.

plugins.name: prompt-builder
plugins.description: Iterative prompt engineering assistant — pick a framework, draft, critique, and deliver a finished artefact with test cases.

plugins.name: imps
plugins.description: Swarm orchestrator — decomposes tasks into parallel model-routed agents, dispatches via Workflow, merges through gates and persona review.

plugins.name: ape
plugins.description: Apes open-source repos for techniques transferable to your codebase — parallel gibbon discovery, orangutan deep analysis, silverback synthesis, all run by one ape-wrangler so the orchestrator only sees the fingerprint and final recommendations.
